statement: In every magma, Equation 435 (`x = x * (y * (x * (z * w)))`) implies Equation 1651 (`x = (x * y) * ((x * z) * y)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0221
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op x (op y (op x (op z w))))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op x y) (op (op x z) y))
